@tiptap/extension-placeholder.reason: Placeholder support for the Tiptap-based thread composer.

@tiptap/starter-kit.reason: Bundles the editor primitives used by the Tiptap-based composer.

@tiptap/vue-3.reason: Vue integration layer for the existing rich text composer.

@types/md5.reason: Type coverage for the md5 package used in avatar hashing.

@vueuse/core.reason: Shared reactive browser utilities already used for storage and breakpoint hooks.

date-fns.reason: Date formatting and relative time utilities across channel, thread, and admin views.

dompurify.reason: Sanitizes rendered markdown HTML before insertion into the DOM.

highlight.js.reason: Syntax highlighting for markdown code blocks.

lucide-vue-next.reason: Shared icon set used throughout the Vue UI.

marked.reason: Markdown parsing for preview and message rendering flows.

match-sorter.reason: Fuzzy ranking for quick-switcher search results.

md5.reason: Gravatar-compatible MD5 hashing for email-based avatar fallbacks.

@playwright/test.reason: End-to-end and visual regression testing framework.

@tailwindcss/postcss.reason: PostCSS integration for the Tailwind CSS build pipeline.

@types/dompurify.reason: Pinned compatibility types for the current DOMPurify import shape.

@types/marked.reason: Pinned compatibility types for the current marked import shape.

@types/node.reason: Node.js type definitions required by Vite, Vitest, and config files.

@vitejs/plugin-vue.reason: Official Vite integration for Vue SFC compilation.

@vue/test-utils.reason: Vue component testing utilities used by existing frontend tests.

@vue/tsconfig.reason: Base TypeScript configuration preset for Vue projects.

jsdom.reason: DOM environment for frontend unit and integration-style tests.

postcss.reason: CSS transformation pipeline used by Vite and Tailwind.

tailwindcss.reason: Primary utility CSS framework for the frontend.

typescript.reason: Type checking and type-driven build support for the frontend.

vite.reason: Primary frontend development server and production bundler.

vitest.reason: Primary frontend unit and integration test runner.

vue-tsc.reason: Vue-aware TypeScript checking for the production build.

picomatch.reason: Force a known-safe transitive matcher release across the frontend toolchain.
picomatch.removeWhen: All upstream build and test dependencies resolve to an equivalent or newer safe picomatch release without local forcing.

trustedPostInstallSteps.name: Playwright browser install
trustedPostInstallSteps.scope: Explicit local E2E setup and the CI visual parity job only.
trustedPostInstallSteps.reason: Browser binaries are required for Playwright tests but must not be installed through dependency lifecycle scripts.
